stemHtml: What is the effect of a higher temperature on climb performance?

options.a: The speed for the best climb angle decreases due to the lower air density.
options.b: The maximum rate of climb increases due to a higher True Air Speed (TAS).
options.c: The maximum climb angle decreases due to a reduction in the thrust available.
options.d: The engine is no longer flat-rated and the maximum climb angle is increased.
